title: Initial Design Workspace
goal: Establish the folder structure, schemas, and design guidelines for Anton Character Design Studio v0.1.
text: Act as a Pixar Character Designer. Build a minimal, dark-themed, glassmorphic design workspace inside /anton folder for iterative character development. Ensure clean CSS variables, modular JS, and a placeholder gecko silhouette. Do not write final gecko SVG paths yet.
notes: Ensured clean decoupled modules and localStorage data separation.

title: Eyes and Gaze Logic
goal: Develop pupillary scale adjustments and mouse-tracking gaze behaviors.
text: Create an eye component with adjustable scale properties, pupil dilation rates, and smooth linear interpolation (lerp) following the cursor positions. Document the gaze limits and snap vectors inside Anton_DNA.json.
notes: Requires HTML Canvas or scalable inline SVGs.

title: Emotion State Modulators
goal: Design morphing animations for the 6 target emotional expressions.
text: Act as a character technical director. Design CSS transitions or canvas keyframe definitions for Neutral, Curious, Focused, Happy, Sleepy, and Alert emotions. Eye-scales, tilt degrees, and tail-wag weights must morph smoothly.
notes: Make sure lock status is checked in the sidebar before allowing changes.
